prompt: Create a dark editorial fashion photograph in a moody old library interior. A stylish young woman with long dark brown wavy hair sits on polished wooden steps, posed with one leg crossed and extended toward the camera, wearing a black blazer over a leopard-print high-neck top, a gray denim mini skirt with a black belt, bracelets, and pointed stiletto heels with a leopard pattern and metallic dark toe caps. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur centered over the face, while her hair remains visible around it. Her left hand lightly touches her hair or collar, and her right hand rests on a stack of exactly 2 antique leather-bound books placed beside her on the step. The setting is a dim, aristocratic study with dark wood wall panels, a patterned upholstered armchair on the left, tall bookshelves filled with old books on the right, and a subtle animal-print rug in the background. Use harsh direct flash photography mixed with deep shadows, high contrast, glossy highlights on skin and wood, a slightly underexposed background, and a luxury magazine / paparazzi fashion aesthetic. Vertical composition, full-body seated pose, low camera angle, warm brown and black color palette, realistic textures, no visible text except a tiny unobtrusive photographer-style watermark in the lower right reading nuyoah.
